message:
fix(node): prevent integer overflow in 4 modules with wider intermediates and clamping

Addresses potential integer overflow and unsafe cast scenarios by using
wider intermediate types and bounded conversions.

- connector/incident_bundle_retention.rs: Cast total_bytes to u128 before
  percentage multiplication to prevent overflow for large storage values
- control_plane/cancellation_injection.rs: Use i128 intermediate for
  u64-to-i64 resource delta conversions to avoid wrapping on values
  exceeding i64::MAX
- connector/supervision.rs: Replace bare usize-to-u32 casts with
  u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX) fallback to prevent truncation
  on 64-bit platforms
- supply_chain/reputation.rs: Clamp days_elapsed to i32::MAX before
  powi() to prevent panic from exponent overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
